issue_title: [bug]`torch.linalg.solve_triangular(A, B, *, out=B)`: wrong result with `B.is_neg() == True`
surface_reasoning: Priority 1: labeled `module: correctness (silent)` + `module: cuda` + `module: linear algebra` + `actionable`. Title: `torch.linalg.solve_triangular(A, B, *, out=B)` wrong result when `B.is_neg() == True` — silent correctness bug in CUDA triangular solve with in-place output and conjugate flag. Domain relevance: triangular solve on CUDA uses cuBLAS `trsm`; the `is_neg` (conjugate) flag interacts with the in-place output buffer in the CUDA kernel dispatch, requiring cuBLAS API expertise.
